message.content:
Looking at this, I need to:
1. Understand the compressor/decompressor format
2. Write a matching compressor in Python
3. Generate data.comp

Let me start by examining the files and compiling.

```json
{
  "analysis": "I can see decomp.c - it's an arithmetic-coded LZ77 decompressor. I need to write a matching compressor. Let me first check the data and verify the decompressor works.",
  "plan": "1. Check data.txt details, 2. Compile and verify decompressor, 3. Write a Python compressor that matches the decoder's format exactly",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "cat /app/data.txt | wc -c; file /app/decomp; echo '---'; head -c 200 /app/data.txt | xxd | head -5; echo '---'; tail -c 20 /app/data.txt | xxd\n", "duration": 0.5},
    {"keystrokes": "echo -n 'test' | /app/decomp | xxd; echo $?\n", "duration": 0.5}
  ]
}
```
